stemHtml: Which of the following statements about the tropopause is correct?

options.a: The temperature at the Polar tropopause is -56.5°C.
options.b: The temperature at the Equatorial tropopause is -75°C.
options.c: The temperature at the Equatorial tropopause is -40°C.
options.d: The temperature at the Polar tropopause is -75°C.
